'''鈭歬-t-ch-t''' ('''kakatchetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:easternize|easternize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-t-ch-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:easternize|easternize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-t-ch-t
|-
! Lemma
| kakatchetoko
|}
